title: TOMC - CreeFern
description: Why would a creature self-destruct as a means of attack? To reproduce!
body:
![Creefern, or the Creeper Fern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8166a499dcd0a3c77b1123597de36e2cf0c6109.png)
# OVERVIEW
**Why would a creature abandon its survival instinct and instead resort to self-explosion as a means of attack on its evolutionary journey -- For the sake of reproduction!**

This MOD belongs to my TOMC (Tales of Minecraft) series. If you like it, please continue to follow us! My partners and I will continue to produce contents like this as much as possible!

# FEATURES
After installing this mod, a new plant called "Creefern", which means Creeper-Fern, will be naturally generated in the overworld, and will be generated more in jungle biomes. It has 3 growth stages and can be ripened with bone meal. When fully ripened, it will turn into a Creeper entity. Most importantly, a creeper's explosion will spread a large number of creeferns within a certain range, so remember to clean them up in time! What's more, The Creeper Spores dropped by the first 2 stages of creeferns can be used for composting, while the 3rd stage of creeferns that have not yet transformed into a creeper entity will directly drop several Gunpowder!

# STATEMENT
**Feel free to add it to your modpack if you want!**

This mod can be approximated as a high-version remake of the "_Organic Creepers_" mod by Konlii, which has been discontinued. Actually my mod has a considerable amount of my personal understanding and modification compared to Konlii, and I have no direct relationship with Konlii.



PERSONAL HOMEPAGE: https://space.bilibili.com/583103610
